content: Hi, I'm Sutton, and I'm a DevOps Engineer at a cloud platform. I recently adopted a parrot named Milo from a shelter, and he's been a great addition to my life.
Congratulations on the new feathered family member! How's the adjustment been to having a parrot?
It's been great! Milo is such a smart bird, and he loves learning new tricks. I've actually been teaching him to mimic my favorite rust programming phrases.
That's hilarious! It's great that you have a pet that can keep up with your tech interests. What inspired you to become a DevOps Engineer?

I've always been passionate about technology and problem-solving, and I wanted to work in a field that would challenge me. I've been working in DevOps for over 10 years, and it's been a great fit for me.
That's wonderful! It's great that you have a career that you're passionate about. What do you like to do in your free time?
I love skiing and trying out new home automation projects. My friend, Ethan, is actually a great skier and has been teaching me some new techniques.
That sounds like a great way to relax! What's your favorite type of ski resort to visit?

I love skiing in the Rockies, especially in Colorado. The mountains are just so beautiful, and the skiing is always challenging. I've actually been planning a trip to Vail for my birthday on February 27th.
That sounds like a great way to celebrate your birthday! Have you thought about starting a family of your own?
I've thought about it, but I'm not sure yet. I'm focusing on my career and enjoying my time with Milo for now. We do love spending time with our friends and their kids, though.
That's understandable. It's great that you have a strong support system. What's the most important thing to you in your relationships with your friends and family?
I think it's just being able to trust and support each other. We've had some tough times, but we always manage to come out stronger on the other side.
That's great to hear. It's clear that you value your relationships. Have you thought about taking a break from your work to travel or explore new places?
You mentioned earlier that you love skiing. Have you considered taking a ski trip to Europe?
Actually, I've been thinking about taking a trip to the Alps next year. It's a dream come true for me as a skier.
